function addAction(string calldata batchId, bytes32 dataHash, uint8 actionType) external
function getHistory(string calldata batchId) external view returns (address owner, tuple(bytes32 dataHash, uint8 actionType, uint64 timestamp, address recorder)[] actions)
function verifyAction(string calldata batchId, uint256 index, bytes32 dataHash) external view returns (bool matched)
function getActionCount(string calldata batchId) external view returns (uint256 count)
function batchExists(string calldata batchId) external view returns (bool)
function getBatchOwner(string calldata batchId) external view returns (address)
event BatchCreated(string indexed batchId, address indexed owner, uint256 timestamp)
event ActionAdded(string indexed batchId, bytes32 dataHash, uint8 actionType, address indexed recorder, uint256 timestamp)
